age_range.evidence: Our study involved an analysis of 2,061 posts generated by 1,038 distinct users between the age range of 13 to 17 years.

gender_split.evidence: With respect to gender distribution, the majority of the posts were made by adolescents who identified as female (53%), followed by those who did not specify their gender (33%), and lastly, by those who identified as male (14%).

countries.evidence: Our search resulted in posts mentioning nine of the top ten platforms (Twitch did not appear in the search results). Also, to focus on more recent trends, we only included posts from the last two years of the dataset (2019 and 2020), which resulted in a total of 2,465 posts.

sample_size.evidence: Our study involved an analysis of 2,061 posts generated by 1,038 distinct users between the age range of 13 to 17 years.
